loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-Panel-1 context rail; 2 of 8 primary feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark (no data), so their breakdown values are omitted.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across 7 active feeders (UPS-01 to UPS-04, BPDB-01, BPDB-02); UPS-05, UPS-06, and Solar Incomers are dark (no data) and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — contracted supply limit is unknown for this asset, so the consumption percentage is not calculated.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel-summed active power trend and peak; per-member breakdown is rendered by the panel-aggregate renderer from member meters.
